text: This place feels deserted and dimly lit, as if inhabited by the ghost of industry and innovation long gone quiet. Surrounded by dark hallways and half-glimpsed words on the wall, I am unsettled and alert. I wonder what stories echo here in this chill silence, and if the intellect that once filled this space has left any warmth for me to discover. I feel small and slightly anxious, eager to find meaning where light and shadow collide.
